questions.q: Which player scored 41 points and grabbed 24 rebounds to lead the Spurs to a double-overtime victory over the Thunder in Game 1 of the 2026 Western Conference finals?
Which Canadian researcher, who helped spearhead the creation of the Special Olympics in the 1960s, died at the age of 96 in May 2026?
Ahead of the 2026 World Cup, FIFA officials traveled to which country to negotiate a broadcast deal amid fears of a television blackout?
Who scored the overtime winner for the Montreal Canadiens in Game 7 to defeat the Buffalo Sabres 3-2 and advance to the 2026 Eastern Conference finals?
By winning the 2026 PGA Championship, Aaron Rai became the first player born in which country to capture the major in more than a century?
